description: Positive cases: prompts asking to draft inter-service contracts, design API shapes, or design inter-service interactions. Negative cases: service discovery, workspace setup, implementation, cleanup, or single-service tasks.

positive_cases.prompt: Draft the contracts for PROJ-1234 — services: order-service, payment-service.
Design the API shape for the checkout flow between order-service and payment-service.
Design the inter-service interactions for PROJ-5678.
What's the contract for order-service calling payment-service?
feature-state.json shows phase: contracts and worktrees set up for PROJ-1234. Proceed.
Before we start coding, draft the inter-service contracts. Services: order-service, notification-service, loyalty-service.

negative_cases.prompt: Which services do I need to change for PROJ-1234?
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Service discovery question — use service-discovery skill.

negative_cases.prompt: Set up worktrees for PROJ-1234. Services are confirmed: order-service, payment-service.
Write a unit test for OrderService.processOrder.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Single-service TDD task — use test-driven-development skill.

negative_cases.prompt: Start parallel implementation across order-service and payment-service for PROJ-1234.
Clean up PROJ-1234 — remove worktrees and branches.
Run the multi-service integration tests for PROJ-1234.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Integration test task — use a different skill.

negative_cases.prompt: Start a new feature: PROJ-2000 adds promo code support at checkout.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Fresh feature kickoff — use springboot-feature-bootstrap; contracts phase not reached yet.
